content: Balul, telul, kilul, folul, lulul, mälul, velul, jölul, zülul, balsul, balul e batul binoms muls balsetel yela.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by soweli_Elepanto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:January, February, March, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November and December are the twelve months of the year
